cards.back: A set that is either empty or can be divided into two non-empty, disjoint subsets.
A set that cannot be divided into two non-empty, disjoint subsets.
A set where every point can be joined to every other point by a line segment without leaving the set.
A maximal connected subset of a topological space.
A subset of the real line where any two points can be joined by a continuous path.
